message:
feat(api,nn): add conv1d/conv2d, pooling, and normalization functionals

Implement torch.nn.functional equivalents for convolution (conv1d, conv2d),
pooling (avg_pool1d, avg_pool2d, max_pool1d, max_pool2d), and normalization
(layer_norm, group_norm, instance_norm1d, instance_norm2d) via im2col-style
patch extraction and batched matmul. Includes shared helpers for pool-output
validation, optional affine application, and error construction. All new ops
have unit tests covering basic forward passes, bias application, and input
validation.

Also fix clippy lint in ft-nn: replace `shape.len() < 1` with
`shape.is_empty()` in MultiLabelMarginLoss.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
